friendly_name: Opt-in SPDD and REASONS Canvas Doctrine Pack
purpose_context: Adapts Martin Fowler's SPDD/REASONS pattern to Spec Kitty's philosophy: code remains the source of truth for current behavior, while structured prompts and canvases capture change-intent and decision boundaries. Activation is fully charter-driven so inactive projects see no prompt, context, or review changes.
purpose_tldr: Ship an opt-in doctrine pack that lets projects activate Structured-Prompt-Driven Development and REASONS Canvas through charter selection without changing behavior for projects that don't select it.
source_description: Implement epic #873: opt-in SPDD/REASONS doctrine pack across 6 WPs (#876, #879, #878, #875, #877, #874). Brief: .kittify/mission-brief.md.
